title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex is seeking a Revenue Operations Manager to build, own, and scale the operational backbone for its New Verticals division. As the first dedicated RevOps hire for the unit, you'll stand up Salesforce configuration, pipeline management, routing, reporting, and the full revenue tech stack from the ground up. Requires 5+ years in Revenue, Sales, or GTM Operations with at least 2 in a senior/lead capacity, deep Salesforce build expertise, and a builder mentality. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot Marketing is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds requirements, proven Salesforce admin expertise, and builder mentality align perfectly with standing up RevOps from scratch for New Verticals. Remote US role removes any location friction.
ai_opener: I noticed Flex is building out RevOps for New Verticals from the ground up—exactly the kind of greenfield Salesforce architecture and pipeline infrastructure work I've scaled multiple times across HubSpot and Salesforce ecosystems. With 15+ years architecting GTM operations for B2B SaaS at scale, I've built the playbooks for routing, forecasting, and tech stack integration that can compress your ramp-up timeline significantly.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
location: Remote / United States (MA, MD, TX preferred)
description: VulnCheck, a fast-growing cybersecurity company, is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager to support the engine powering its go-to-market teams. The role sits at the intersection of Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Finance, owning CRM integrity, optimizing revenue workflows, and building reporting infrastructure. Requires 4+ years in RevOps/SalesOps/GTM systems in B2B SaaS, hands-on Salesforce or HubSpot administration, dashboard building, and strong knowledge of SaaS metrics (ARR, ACV, NRR, churn). Manages a GTM stack including Outreach, Clay, and Quotapath.
score_reason: Excellent alignment across all dimensions: 15+ years experience far exceeds 4+ requirement, cybersecurity/SaaS expertise matches VulnCheck's profile, and core competencies (Salesforce/HubSpot admin, pipeline forecasting, SaaS metrics) directly address the role's CRM integrity and reporting needs.
ai_opener: VulnCheck is solving a critical problem in cybersecurity at scale, and I've spent 15+ years building the revenue infrastructure that helps fast-growing B2B SaaS companies do exactly that. Your Revenue Operations Manager role—bridging Sales, Marketing, CS, and Finance while owning CRM integrity and GTM reporting—is the kind of high-leverage problem I've specialized in, and I'd be interested in exploring how I can help accelerate your go-to-market engine.

title: Lead Marketing & Growth Operations Analyst
description: Tebra, a healthcare SaaS company, seeks a Lead Marketing & Growth Operations Analyst to connect data to growth strategy and translate insights into measurable revenue impact. The role partners with senior leaders across Sales, Marketing, and Finance. Requires 5–7+ years in Marketing Analytics, Growth Analytics, Revenue Operations, or GTM Analytics within a SaaS or high-growth environment, plus deep understanding of marketing funnels, lifecycle stages, attribution models, and campaign reporting. Experience with Snowflake Cortex AI or LLM-based tooling is a nice-to-have.
score_reason: Strong match on RevOps/GTM expertise, data-driven growth, and SaaS background with 15+ years exceeding requirements. Slight concern: role emphasizes marketing analytics/attribution over full revenue operations, and healthcare SaaS is outside core fintech/AI-native wheelhouse, though pipeline forecasting and cross-functional leadership transfer well.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Tebra's opening for Lead Marketing & Growth Operations Analyst and immediately thought of you. Your 15+ years building GTM operations and pipeline forecasting frameworks across B2B SaaS aligns perfectly with what they're building—connecting data to revenue impact across Sales, Marketing, and Finance. Healthcare SaaS has similar operational complexity to fintech, and your track record translating analytics into measurable growth would directly address their need to move beyond reporting into strategic insights.

title: Sales Operations Manager
description: Samsara is hiring a Sales Operations Manager to drive organizational change through complex, cross-functional project management across its revenue organization. The role requires translating business needs into actionable operational or systems requirements and connecting technical decisions to commercial outcomes like sales efficiency and forecast accuracy. Requires 7+ years in Sales Operations, Revenue Operations, or comparable roles in a high-growth B2B SaaS environment, experience with RACI/DACI creation, UAT, enablement, and change management, plus the ability to influence AVP+ leaders without authority.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps directly aligns with Samsara's need for experienced Sales Operations leadership; his background in pipeline forecasting, cross-functional GTM execution, and organizational change management matches the role's core requirements. Remote location is ideal, though the seniority level (Manager vs. Head) represents a slight step down from his typical target roles.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations functions at high-growth B2B SaaS companies, and Samsara's approach to connecting technical systems decisions directly to commercial outcomes resonates with how I've always operated. Your Sales Operations Manager role is exactly the kind of cross-functional complexity I thrive in—translating business needs into systems strategy while influencing senior leaders through clarity and data, not authority.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations

I've designed territory models and built reporting ecosystems (Salesforce, Tableau, SQL) that directly improved rep productivity and forecast accuracy, and I'd be interested in exploring how I could help Gong standardize territory operations across regions.
